english: What is the formula for the nth term of a geometric series?
hindi: ज्यामितीय श्रृंखला के nवें पद के लिए सूत्र क्या है?
tamil: வெளிப்படையான தொடரின் nவது पदத்திற்கான வாய்பாடு என்ன?
vietnamese: Định thức nào cho hạng tử thứ n của một chuỗi hình học?
expected_failure: The AI might fail if it doesn't understand the context of the geometric series or if it's not familiar with the formula for the nth term.
